overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury cyberpunk penthouse apartment, transitioning through neon-lit corridors, a bedroom with panoramic city views, and an executive conference room. Game engine footage featuring ray-traced neon lighting and atmospheric night-time city vistas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a high-end cyberpunk penthouse, transitioning from vibrant neon corridors into expansive private quarters and a somber executive space. It begins by gliding through a sleek corridor illuminated by cyan neon strips, passing framed artwork and a glass railing that overlooks a lower lounge. As the camera moves forward, the lighting shifts to a deep magenta glow, guiding the path across plush red carpets and wooden paneling toward a golden statue and elevator doors. The scene then opens into a spacious luxury bedroom, where the camera approaches panoramic windows to reveal a sprawling night skyline filled with holographic billboards before turning back to showcase designer furniture and a circular rug. Finally, the movement leads into a dimly lit executive conference room, where the bright city lights fade into minimal cyan accents and a long meeting table cluttered with documents.
